texto: What has God called a religion? Renunciation is not religion. To be free of anger-pride-deceit-greed (kashays) is religion
autor: or to have feeble (tamed) kashays is religion. That’s all. Only these two are religion.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de or to have feeble (tamed) kashays is religion. That’s all. Only these two are religion. que provoca temas ligados a fe. Ao questionar “What has God called a religion? Renunciation is not religion. To be free of anger-pride-deceit-gr…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, dada-bhagwan, reflexao, com foco em reflexao.
